title: actaea spicata subsp. nigra
intro: Actaea spicata subsp. nigra, also known as black cohosh, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the Ranunculaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and sedative effects. The health benefits of black cohosh include relief from symptoms of menopause such as hot flashes, mood swings, and night sweats, as well as its potential to reduce anxiety and promote better sleep. Black cohosh is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and can be found in herbal supplements and traditional Chinese medicine.
